title: wrong result with perform decorrelation
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

create database test;
create table test.hcst_test_sel_dual (amount decimal(65,20),segment1 varchar(50));
INSERT INTO test.hcst_test_sel_dual (amount, segment1) VALUES (6.23000000000000000000, '60021022342');
INSERT INTO test.hcst_test_sel_dual (amount, segment1) VALUES (30025.20000000000000000000, '60121022342');
INSERT INTO test.hcst_test_sel_dual (amount, segment1) VALUES (0.00000000000000000000, '60021022342');
SELECT (SELECT IF(substr(dd.segment1,1,3)='600','X','') FROM dual WHERE dd.amount<>0) c1,dd.amount,dd.segment1 FROM test.hcst_test_sel_dual dd;

Use hint NO_DECORRELATE() to specify that the subquery, the execution result is correct.

 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
+------+----------------------------+-------------+
| c1   | amount                     | segment1    |
+------+----------------------------+-------------+
| X    |     6.23000000000000000000 | 60021022342 |
|      | 30025.20000000000000000000 | 60121022342 |
| NULL |     0.00000000000000000000 | 60021022342 |
+------+----------------------------+-------------+

 3. What did you see instead (Required)
 +------+----------------------------+-------------+
| c1   | amount                     | segment1    |
+------+----------------------------+-------------+
| X    |     6.23000000000000000000 | 60021022342 |
|      | 30025.20000000000000000000 | 60121022342 |
| X    |     0.00000000000000000000 | 60021022342 |
+------+----------------------------+-------------+

 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

v8.5.2
poc: SELECT (SELECT IF(substr(dd.segment1,1,3)='600','X','') FROM dual WHERE dd.amount<>0) c1,dd.amount,dd.segment1 FROM test.hcst_test_sel_dual dd;
key_bug_features: performing decorrelation on subquery with specific conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_fuzz.hcst_test_fuzz (amount DECIMAL(65,20) NOT NULL, segment1 VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unknown', segment2 INT CHECK (segment2 >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_fuzz.hcst_test_fuzz (amount, segment1, segment2) VALUES (12.34000000000000000000, '60021022343', 1);
INSERT INTO test_fuzz.hcst_test_fuzz (amount, segment1, segment2) VALUES (0.00000000000000000000, '60121022343', NULL);
SELECT (SELECT IF(substr(dd.segment1,1,3)='600','Y','N') FROM dual WHERE dd.amount > 0) c1, dd.amount, dd.segment1, dd.segment2 FROM test_fuzz.hcst_test_fuzz dd;
